reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención, lastima los precios altísimos del Gas Oil cuestan hoy casi igual a las Naftas. En el año 2000 el Gas Oil si mal lo recuerdo estaba el litro a 0,24 centavos de pesos, y las Naftas 1peso  esa era la relación. Ahora el Gas Oil casi está Igual al precio de las Naftas. En EEUU y países desarrollados cuestan muchísimo menos que en Argentina año 2020, acá te cobran todo  impuestos País de gente chorra impresentables que no tienen ni código ni principios y menos ética.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, it's a shame the prices of diesel are so high; it costs almost as much as gasoline these days. If I remember correctly, in 2000 diesel was 0.24 pesos per liter, and gasoline was 1 peso; that was the ratio. Now diesel is almost the same price as gasoline. In the US and other developed countries, it costs much less than in Argentina in 2020. Here, they charge you taxes on everything. This is a country of thieving, despicable people who have no code, no principles, and certainly no ethics.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM4bXZUOUJ3EAE

reviews.comment:
Muy mal servicio y atención.Casi nunca les funciona el sist. para cobrar con la app YPF/QR. Siempre solo tienen 2 empleados y se hacen colas con mucha espera.muy mal organizado. Los baños casi nunca funcionan.

(Translated by Google)
Very poor service and customer service. Their payment system using the YPF/QR app almost never works. They always have only two employees, resulting in very long lines. Very poorly organized. The restrooms are almost never in working order.
